acceptance_criteria: docs/GATE-M2.md records M2 Roadmap and acceptance-matrix evidence for season/economy choices, agriculture/population/road-network conservation, map/list client behavior, H-001/H-002 initial validation, and map source policy.
M2 exit evidence proves mobilization across farm timing affects the next harvest and seasonal roads/rivers produce different route choices.
M2 exit evidence proves normal speed UI has no main-thread simulation stutter and the 4,000-row list pressure fixture is covered.
M2 exit evidence proves the content compiler rejects bad maps and bad references.
M1-GATE follow-ups are explicitly closed or the gate blocks: Chromium plus Electron host hash canary, and sim-core/content-runtime boot-boundary contract test.
No product code, package code, content-source data, roadmap edits, accepted ADR changes, or M3+ scope is modified by this validation task.
systems_architect writer and independent qa_reviewer reviewer produce validated handoffs before lead marks M2 accepted.
required_tests: node -e JSON validation for M2 gate task, goal-mode-state, model-routing-state, relevant M2 handoffs, and systems handoff
M2 Chromium host hash canary command
M2 Electron host hash canary command
M2 map/list pressure command including 4,000-row list evidence
notes: MILESTONE-AUTONOMY-AMENDMENT-001 allows ordinary M2 exit only when the acceptance matrix, tests, independent review, and no R4/frozen-decision Human Gate conditions are satisfied.
This task validates M2 only; it must not start M3 polity, office, character, vassal, or succession work.
